title: FlowRunner Flow v1.0
$comment: CROSS-APP CONTRACT: this .flow.json format is shared by FlowRunner UI (JS), flowrunner-cli (Python; 24/7 headless; stricter parser), and the ShowRunner Demo-Management-Portal. Evolve additive-only; never rename/repurpose staticVars, the wire keys then/else/steps (not thenSteps/elseSteps/loopSteps), onFailure, type, the ##VAR:type:name## body markers, conditionData operators, or the extract namespaces. schemaVersion is OPTIONAL and additive: a string "MAJOR.MINOR"; ABSENCE means "1.0". Readers tolerate an unknown MINOR (degrade gracefully) and are expected to reject an unknown MAJOR loudly (see docs/schema-versioning.md). Never make schemaVersion required and never gate the wire format on it. See the FlowRunner repo architecture.md / gotchas.md / masterplan.md and docs/flowmap-evolution.md.

schemaVersion.$comment: OPTIONAL additive version tag, string "MAJOR.MINOR" (e.g. "1.0"). Absence is treated as "1.0". Additive-only: MUST NOT be added to the required array, MUST NOT change the wire format. Unknown MINOR ⇒ tolerate/degrade; unknown MAJOR ⇒ reject loudly (reader policy, not schema-enforced).
